name: tab-chord-formatter
description: Format a messy guitar tab or chord sheet into a clean, standard, readable layout — for screen or print. Paste a tab copied from anywhere and get back a normalized chord sheet: standardized [Section] labels, chords aligned over the right lyric syllables, a tidy metadata header (Title/Artist/Capo/Key/Tuning), and well-formed 6-line ASCII tab blocks. Print mode renders a consistent monospace PDF songbook (one or many songs, a target number of songs per page) via headless Chromium. A bundled script does the deterministic cleanup and rendering; the skill applies judgment to re-align chords and infer structure.
